evidence.claim: The user cannot see posts from groups they are not a member of
evidence.fact: Privacy controls whether non-friends can view their posts.
evidence.user_story_span: I do not see posts from groups I am not a member of

evidence.claim: Each post is associated with a specific group
evidence.fact: The group feed lists only posts made within that group.
evidence.user_story_span: Each post is associated with a specific group
evidence.fact_span: The group feed lists only posts made within that group.

evidence.claim: The feed may be sorted by relevance
evidence.fact: The report record includes a reason dropdown.
evidence.user_story_span: The feed may be sorted by time or relevance

evidence.fact: The verified badge is a boolean flag toggle.
